baseline.label: St. Synthetic Regional Hospital — emergency / urgent care

offers.notes: MinuteClinic visits average $159 nationwide — for the same non-emergency complaint that landed you in the ER, this is the right venue next time. Walk-in or same-day appointments.
Same-day urgent care chain in 17 states. Average $189 for moderate-complexity visits — well under ER pricing for non-life-threatening symptoms.

best.notes: MinuteClinic visits average $159 nationwide — for the same non-emergency complaint that landed you in the ER, this is the right venue next time. Walk-in or same-day appointments.

headline: Found MinuteClinic at $159 vs your $1,680 ER visit — saves $1,521 next time you need this kind of care.

baseline.label: St. Synthetic Regional Hospital — outpatient imaging

offers.notes: Cash-pay outpatient imaging center — chest X-ray (2 views) is $90 nationally, vs the hospital's $468. Same diagnostic image quality.
Independent imaging network in 22 states. Direct cash-pay X-ray pricing typically $95–$125, no facility-fee markup.

best.notes: Cash-pay outpatient imaging center — chest X-ray (2 views) is $90 nationally, vs the hospital's $468. Same diagnostic image quality.

headline: Found RadiologyAssist at $90 vs the hospital's $468 — same image, 80% less.

offers.notes: Every nonprofit hospital is required to maintain a written financial assistance policy under IRS section 501(r). Households up to 200% of the federal poverty level often qualify for 100% write-off; up to 400% commonly qualify for sliding-scale discounts of 50–80%. Apply concurrently with Bonsai's negotiation — they stack.
